plugins.name: product-designer
plugins.description: Senior product designer agent for any product, any stack. Stack-agnostic — reads the target repo's conventions at runtime. On first run, auto-detects project state (NEW/PARTIAL/MATURE) and persists the design system: writes docs/design.md, injects a strictly-additive design-first fenced block into CLAUDE.md, and updates docs/design.md on every design decision so context carries across sessions. Ships with 13 specialised skills and a /product-designer:sync-design-system slash command.
